phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Praça do Rossio on foot
phrases.text_local: Como chego a pé à Praça do Rossio daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MOO SHEH-goo uh PEH [liaison: uh-PEH] AH PRAH-sah [liaison: AH-PRAH-sah] doo ROH-see-oo [liaison: doo-ROH-see-oo] dah-KEE
phrases.cultural_note: Rua Augusta is pedestrian-only and slopes upward, leading directly to the historic Rossio square.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga a rua até ao Rossio.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH ROOUH uh-TEH OW roo-SEEOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the street until Rossio.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the street until Rossio.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH ROOUH uh-TEH OW roo-SEEOO.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga a rua até ao Rossio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Arco viewpoint entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada para o miradouro do Arco?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah-ah (link) en-TRAH-jah PAH-rah-oo (link) mee-rah-DOH-roo doo-AR-koo (link)
phrases.cultural_note: The elevator provides a paid shortcut up the historic cobblestone street to the viewpoint.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao Elevador do Arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW eh-lih-vuh-DOHR DOO AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the Elevador do Arco.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the Elevador do Arco.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW eh-lih-vuh-DOHR DOO AH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto ao Elevador do Arco.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada para o miradouro do Arco da Rua Augusta?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH ROOUH ow-GOOSH-tuh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao bilheteiro do Arco, que lhe dará indicações.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo DOO AH-ruh-koo, KIH LYIH duh-RAH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the arch ticket seller, who will give you directions.

responses.english: Go to the arch ticket seller, who will give you directions.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo DOO AH-ruh-koo, KIH LYIH duh-RAH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao bilheteiro do Arco, que lhe dará indicações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Praça do Comércio
phrases.text_local: Scusi, como chegar à Praça do Comércio?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, KOH-moo shih-GAHR AH PRAH-suh DOO koo-MEH-ruhs-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua Augusta leads directly to Praça do Comércio, a large square by the Tagus River. It's a popular meeting point.

likely_response.local: Siga em frente, no final da rua.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh AYNG FRAYNG-tih, NOO fee-NAHL DUH ROOUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight, at the end of the street.

responses.english: Go straight, at the end of the street.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh AYNG FRAYNG-tih, NOO fee-NAHL DUH ROOUH.
responses.french: Siga em frente, no final da rua.

phrases.text_local: Como posso chegar à Praça do Comércio?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo PAW-soo shih-GAHR AH PRAH-suh DOO koo-MEH-ruhs-yoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praça do Comércio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DOO koo-MEH-ruhs-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for Praça do Comércio.

responses.english: Follow the signs for Praça do Comércio.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DOO koo-MEH-ruhs-yoo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Praça do Comércio.
